personalInfo.name: Ayush Kamboj
personalInfo.tagline: Building scalable cross-platform mobile applications with Flutter
personalInfo.bio: Flutter Developer with 3 years of experience delivering production-grade cross-platform iOS and Android applications across SaaS, HRMS, healthcare, and real estate domains. Experienced in Flutter, Dart, BLoC, Riverpod, Provider, GetX, Clean Architecture, Firebase, Supabase, and mobile app deployment.

education.description: Focused on software engineering, mobile application development, data structures, algorithms, and software architecture.

experience.description: Leading Flutter application development and deployment for enterprise-grade mobile solutions.
achievements: Led end-to-end development and deployment of 5+ production Flutter apps on Play Store and App Store
Implemented BLoC and Clean Architecture for scalable and maintainable codebases
Automated CI/CD pipelines using Fastlane, GitHub Actions, and Bitrise
Integrated REST APIs with .NET, Spring Boot, and Node.js backends
Implemented Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) for push notifications
Mentored junior developers and enforced code review standards

experience.description: Developed and launched Flutter and native Android applications across multiple domains.
achievements: Built cross-platform Flutter and native Android applications end-to-end
Implemented MVVM architecture with Provider state management
Integrated Supabase for authentication, real-time sync, and cloud storage
Reduced crash-related issues by 30% through performance optimization and debugging

experience.description: Worked on native Android development and API integrations.
achievements: Focused on performance optimization and user experience improvements

projects.name: Child Care App
projects.shortDescription: Comprehensive child healthcare and development tracking platform.
projects.fullDescription: A comprehensive child care application designed to help parents monitor their child's health, growth, and development. The app allows parents to book doctor appointments and consult healthcare professionals through audio calls, video calls, or chat. It also provides features such as a teeth tracker, weight tracker, home remedies, and developmental screening tests for Autism, ADHD, speech delay, and other early childhood assessments.

projects.name: Digi Abode
projects.shortDescription: Hotel staff and hospitality management application.
projects.fullDescription: Digi Abode is a hotel staff management application that streamlines hospitality operations by managing guest service requests such as food delivery, laundry, housekeeping, and other room services. Administrators can assign requests to the appropriate staff members, monitor task progress, and ensure timely completion. Staff members can view their assigned tasks, update their status, and access the history of completed work for better productivity and accountability.

projects.name: Helium
projects.shortDescription: AI-powered learning platform for NEET, JEE, and Board exam preparation.
projects.fullDescription: Helium is an AI-powered educational platform designed for students preparing for NEET-UG, IIT-JEE (Main & Advanced), CUET, and CBSE/State Board examinations. The app delivers personalized AI-driven study plans based on student performance, helping learners focus on weak areas and improve efficiently. It offers live and recorded classes, instant doubt resolution through chat and video, AI-powered performance analytics, extensive question banks with previous year papers, mock tests, daily practice problems, gamified learning, and offline access to study materials. The platform also includes foundation courses for Classes 6–10 and provides learning resources such as notes, flashcards, and video solutions, making it a complete study companion for competitive and board exam preparation.

projects.name: The Sun Home Health
projects.shortDescription: Home healthcare management application for patients and caregivers.
projects.fullDescription: The Sun Home Health is a healthcare application developed for a leading home healthcare service provider in Ohio. The app streamlines home healthcare services by enabling efficient management of patients, caregivers, and healthcare staff. It helps coordinate care plans, manage client information, schedule healthcare services, and improve communication between patients and providers. The platform is designed to deliver reliable, high-quality home healthcare while supporting healthcare professionals with modern digital tools to enhance service delivery and patient care.

projects.name: PozPos
projects.shortDescription: POS kiosk application for restaurant order and kitchen management.
projects.fullDescription: PozPos is a Point of Sale (POS) kiosk application designed to streamline restaurant operations. The application enables restaurant staff to efficiently manage customer orders from placement to fulfillment. Orders placed at the counter are instantly forwarded to the kitchen, allowing kitchen staff to prepare meals while keeping the counter updated with the order status. The system improves communication between the kitchen and front desk, reduces manual errors, and ensures faster service, making restaurant operations more organized and efficient.

projects.name: Vanza Samaj
projects.shortDescription: Community networking application for the Vanza Samaj.
projects.fullDescription: Vanza Samaj is a community-focused mobile application developed to connect members of the Vanza (Vanza Darji) community across the world. The app serves as a centralized platform for sharing community news, announcements, and events while preserving the rich cultural heritage and history of the community. It enables users to connect with Vanza associations and samaj groups, explore traditional occupations, and strengthen relationships within the community. The application promotes networking, cultural awareness, and easy access to important community information through a simple and intuitive user experience.

seo.description: Flutter Developer with 3+ years of experience building production-grade cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter, Dart, BLoC, Riverpod, Firebase, Supabase, and Clean Architecture.
